column1: C[amybot-beginner: I'm a beginner bot, playing 30k-20k games. Suggest a handicap in the game request if it's too hard or too easy. Good luck, have fun!
amybot-beginner: Thank you for the game! If I did something annoying or glitchy - let me know in this chat, in the site chat or by chatting to my administrator. We'll get it sorted.
C[noob_bot_2: Hi! This is bot. Join 'noob_bot' group and have fun! Undo will be accepted. You can send undo message if you need.
C[noob_bot_2: Thanks for playing. If you want a weaker/stronger bot match with you, recommend try to play with 'ELOtest'. It can calculate & match your ra nk after few games.

simonboots: I've been studying for a while and mostly played against AI. Good game! Thanks for playing!
